svg.metadata: {"_description":"Saga pattern with compensating transactions on failure.","type":"sequence","title":"saga (book trip)","actors":[{"id":"client","label":"Client"},{"id":"orch","label":"Orchestrator","accent":"accent"},{"id":"flight","label":"Flight"},{"id":"hotel","label":"Hotel"},{"id":"car","label":"Car Rental"}],"messages":[{"from":"client","to":"orch","label":"book trip"},{"from":"orch","to":"flight","label":"reserve"},{"from":"flight","to":"orch","label":"ok","kind":"return"},{"from":"orch","to":"hotel","label":"reserve"},{"from":"hotel","to":"orch","label":"ok","kind":"return"},{"from":"orch","to":"car","label":"reserve"},{"from":"car","to":"orch","label":"FAIL","kind":"return"},{"from":"orch","to":"hotel","label":"compensate\n(cancel)","kind":"async"},{"from":"orch","to":"flight","label":"compensate\n(cancel)","kind":"async"},{"from":"orch","to":"client","label":"rolled back","kind":"return"}]}
